description: arXiv:2607.10771v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Matching dependency is a generalization of the functional dependency concept, which allows users to apply custom similarity functions for matching individual attributes. Matching dependencies have a wide range of applications for solving various data quality problems, such as entity resolution, data deduplication, data integration, schema matchi...
